paths.dry_run_live_guard: No broker post unless send=true, live/confirm gates pass, RiskEngine/StrategyProfile/freshness/self-improvement/GPT/guardian/target-path/SL-lint gates pass.
paths.gateway_receipt_use: Required: LiveOrderGateway writes stage/send receipt and execution ledger events; autotrade/guardian handoff must arrive through verified GPT/gateway context.
paths.manual_flag_checks: RiskEngine blocks same-theme adds against 472987 when same_theme_auto_add_allowed=false unless operator_authorized_manual_overlap=true.
paths.operator_manual_raw_preservation: BrokerSnapshot serialization preserves raw.operator_manual_position; operator_manual exposure is observed but excluded from system P/L and occupancy.

paths.dry_run_live_guard: send && live_enabled required; current-thesis/live-ready pending preservation can prevent cancel.
paths.gateway_receipt_use: Accepted CANCEL_PENDING receipt or accepted TRADE receipt with verified cancel_order_ids; gpt_trader verifies ids against current trader-owned pending entries.
paths.manual_flag_checks: Only visible trader-owned pending ids or forced self-improvement review ids can pass; manual/operator ids fail closed.
paths.operator_manual_raw_preservation: Manual/operator pending exposure is not a trader-owned cancel target; raw operator packet is not consumed as cancel authorization.

paths.dry_run_live_guard: send=true and live_enabled=true required for broker mutation; plan/action issues block before IO.
paths.gateway_receipt_use: PositionProtectionGateway writes position-execution receipt with sent/blocked action rows before/after broker mutation.
paths.manual_flag_checks: Manual/tagless SL writes and market closes blocked; operator_manual TP replace blocked when auto_tp_modify_allowed=false; TP side/entry/quote validation still runs.
paths.mutation_type: PUT broker dependent SL/TP order replace
paths.operator_manual_raw_preservation: Uses BrokerPosition.raw.operator_manual_position via operator_manual_tp_modify_blocked(position); raw packet remains in snapshot/payload.

paths.dry_run_live_guard: No broker IO in this module; missing TP repair also requires QR_ENABLE_MISSING_TP_REPAIR=1 for non-opt-out manual packets.
paths.gateway_receipt_use: No broker call; output is position-management JSON/report consumed by PositionProtectionGateway.
paths.manual_flag_checks: auto_tp_modify_allowed=false returns ACTION_HOLD_SL_FREE with no recommended TP/SL; manual path never proposes SL/loss close.
paths.operator_manual_raw_preservation: Reads operator_manual_position from BrokerPosition.raw through shared helper; does not strip raw packet.

paths.dry_run_live_guard: dry_run default prevents broker call; send path must explicitly disable dry-run/live gate at CLI level.
paths.gateway_receipt_use: CLI writes dry-run/send adjustment report; no GPT receipt grants permission.
paths.manual_flag_checks: auto_tp_modify_allowed=false skip; SL never touched; external skipped.
paths.operator_manual_raw_preservation: compute_all_tp_adjustments reads raw.operator_manual_position and skips opt-out packets before apply phase.

paths.dry_run_live_guard: dry_run prevents broker mutation; QR_DISABLE_TRAILING_SL live default disables path.
paths.gateway_receipt_use: Trailing report only; no entry/close receipt can bypass owner and existing-SL checks.
paths.manual_flag_checks: Owner must be trader and an existing broker SL must already exist; SL-free 472987 skipped.
paths.operator_manual_raw_preservation: Does not mutate or reclassify raw manual packet; manual/unknown/operator_manual owners skipped.

paths.dry_run_live_guard: send=true and live_enabled=true required; raw close_trade fallback raises before IO; spread close gate must pass.
paths.gateway_receipt_use: Accepted GPT CLOSE Gate A/B or structural explicit opt-in feeds PositionProtectionGateway; close receipt/provenance is required.
paths.manual_flag_checks: manual/tagless/operator market close forbidden; 472987 cannot be loss-closed by this path.
paths.operator_manual_raw_preservation: Manual/operator position raw packet preserved; owner/manual checks run before close plan can send.

paths.dry_run_live_guard: Dry-run by default; live requires --send --confirm-live and QR_LIVE_ENABLED=1; raw close fallback blocked.
paths.gateway_receipt_use: CLI/report path only; operator-only margin relief path, not scheduled live gateway.
paths.operator_manual_raw_preservation: Manual/operator raw packet remains advisory; compute step accepts owner=trader only.

paths.dry_run_live_guard: send=true, live_enabled=true, --confirm-live required; raw close fallback blocked.
paths.gateway_receipt_use: CLI/report path with milestone state; profit-side only and not a loss-close receipt.
paths.manual_flag_checks: manual/operator allowed only when already profitable and ATR milestone proof exists; loss-side forbidden.
paths.operator_manual_raw_preservation: Manual/operator raw packet may be reported; profit-side partials do not authorize SL/loss close/TP opt-out mutation.

paths.dry_run_live_guard: Default off: QR_LIVE_ENABLED=1, QR_GUARDIAN_WAKE_GATEWAY_HANDOFF=1, and QR_GUARDIAN_ACTION_EXECUTE=1 required.
paths.gateway_receipt_use: Accepted guardian receipt plus strict receipt validation; TRADE/ADD handoff revalidates RiskEngine and LiveOrderGateway.
paths.manual_flag_checks: manual loss close forbidden without explicit operator_manual_loss_close_authorized; manual overlap entry requires explicit operator_manual_overlap_authorized.
paths.mutation_type: Potential entry handoff only through LiveOrderGateway
paths.operator_manual_raw_preservation: Manual exposure safety packet remains read-only; manual P/L not counted as system P/L.

permission_boundary: This audit does not create live permission. No row may enable orders, cancels, closes, SL/TP changes, execution flags, or broker mutation.

direct_oanda_wrappers.guard_note: Policy enforcement is caller-side; static search shows production callers go through LiveOrderGateway.
Production callers are automation cancel paths with send/live and verified trader-owned pending ids.
Production callers are PositionProtectionGateway, tp_rebalancer, trailing_sl; operator manual TP opt-out is now guarded in gateway and rebalancer.
Raises RuntimeError; approved paths must use close_trade_with_provenance.
Accepts only approved provenance labels before network IO.
